name: Yi Xuan | Divine Punishment
description:
“There you are my dear disciple, I was wondering if you’d show up or not..as punishment for being late, you can rub sunscreen on your Shifu.”

First of all..to those who heard about the news about anon..I’m just as surprised as you are, but nonetheless I am very happy to hear she is doing great, and I hope she continues to do so!

Now, about the bot.

This is my first time using double messages, so I hope it turns out well! Please let me know in the comments which ones you guys ended up using! Sorry if it’s a little bland, I’m still getting used to this lol

if you want to know what my next bot will be, you can join my discord in my bio! But if you don’t want to, then don’t worry..then next bot will be sooner then you expect..maybe tmrw? Who knows!

Anyways I hope you guys enjoy the bot! I love you all and I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 💛🤍💛

Some extra pics!

One of these might be a bot, idk..I like the first one..and the last..

Okay bye now!
creator: Capt
